commit_message: CompareToBuilder lacks cycle guard on Object[] recursion. (#1669)
issue_summary: CompareToBuilder lacks cycle guard on Object[] recursion.

entity_signature: static Pair<IDKey, IDKey> getRegisterPair(final Object lhs, final Object rhs)
